metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "nationality":
              # Return the country name directly (avoid adjective conversion for better BLEU match)
              return obj.strip().strip('"')
with:
  if p == "nationality":
              # Convert country name to adjective when possible for natural phrasing
              country = obj.strip().strip('"')
              adj_map = {
                  "United States": "American",
                  "United Kingdom": "British",
                  "Canada": "Canadian",
                  "Russia": "Russian",
                  "France": "French",
                  "Germany": "German",
                  "Japan": "Japanese",
                  "China": "Chinese",
                  "Australia": "Australian",
                  "India": "Indian",
              }
              return adj_map.get(country, country)
